[[BLOCK:slide49_shape1]]
•   In traditional OLS Regression (Ordinary Least Squares regression), the p-value is used to assess the statistical significance of a variable.  
•   The Elastic NET model does not directly provide p-values or measures of statistical significance. Instead, the importance of predictors is inferred from the coefficients and their magnitudes.  
•   The final table on the far-right side displays the coefficient estimates.
